title: Toddler Truck Toys for 2 3 4 5 Year Old Boys Gifts, 5-Pieces Dinosaur Car Toys for Boys Age 2 3 4 5 6, Monster Truck Toy for Kids 2-4, Pull Back Cars for Toddlers Girls Age 2-5 Birthday Gifts
features: 【5 IN 1 Dinosaur Trucks Set】 - A big dinosaur truck and 4 small dinosaur cars in INSTOY dinosaur trucks toys set. Immerse themselves in the world of dinosaurs with triceratops, stegosaurus, tyrannosaurus, pterosaurus. A good toy truck for toddler boy and girl to keep them busy.

【Push and Go Cars】 - Friction power vehicle, your child don't have to experience disappointment when the battery runs out. They can turn the head of the big carrier to change the forward direction. Open the tailgate of the tractor room and bring the small cars down. And push the cart backward, they can run forward by themselves.

【Light and Sound】- Realistic roars and flashing lights are presented in front of their eyes when they press the big dinosaur's horns. Each touch will only produce about 6 seconds of light and sound, so you don't have to worry about it affecting you or others. (3*1.5V batteries are required to enable this function- not included).

【Excellent Toddler Car Toys】 - Dinosaur car toys are made of high-quality and durable ABS plastic, which means that they can withstand fair fall, fall, collision and impact -- and withstand everything your children throw. The outline of each toy car is designed to be very smooth and 100% friendly to children.

【Toy Vehicle Gifts for Love】- This dinosaur truck toy gives toddler boys as an attractive toy to keep them busy for a long time by immersing them in the world of dinosaurs. Highly recommended as a gift for birthday parties, Christmas, resurrection and other holidays, creative gifts for boys and girls.
